result.stdout:
trnullable
Copyright (c) 2024 Ken Domino
# trnullable

## Summary

Input Antlr grammars and print which rules are nullable.

## Description

Reads a parsing result set for a grammar and outputs the rules that are
nullable.

## Usage

trnullable

## Examples

trparse A.g4 | trnullable

## Current version

0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

## License

  -f, --file       Read parse tree data from file instead of stdin.
  -v, --verbose    
  --version        
  --help           Display this help screen.
  --version        Display version information.
